author.bio: M.S. CompSci. @caddyserver & @relicabackup. Member of the restored Church of Jesus Christ. Downvoted for opinions. Comes in second place, every time.
author.name: 🧗‍♂️ Matt Holt

content.text: Folks, I'm serious about this. We've rented billboards with Blip (https://www.blipbillboards.com/) along the I-15 corridor during rush hour to advertise @caddyserver for 🔒HTTPS.
